qa_pairs.question: What is the title and associated file path for the Colvars reference manual mentioned in the document?
qa_pairs.answer: The title is "Colvars Reference manual for GROMACS" and the associated file path is "rs-refman-gromacs/colvars-refman-gromacs.html".

qa_pairs.question: Who authored the 2013 publication titled "Using collective variables to drive molecular dynamics simulations," and what is its digital object identifier (DOI) link?
qa_pairs.answer: The publication "Using collective variables to drive molecular dynamics simulations" was authored by Fiorin et al. in 2013. Its DOI link is http://dx.doi.org/10.1080/00268976.2013.813594.
